claim_bullets.bullet_text: Binding an anonymous function to a name in an environment does not name the function itself (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.62-62).
Arrow functions bind anonymous functions; the function stays unnamed (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.62-62).
Named function expressions provide an internal name for recursion but do not affect the environment binding (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.62-62).

source_record_text: Chapter on naming functions in JavaScript Allongé, covering arrow functions, function keyword, named function expressions, and hoisting.
